cli.title: Copy Aruba CLI configuration
cli.description:
Endpoint: `{endpoint_url}`

This will create {profile_count} BLE Data transport profiles for {filter_count} service UUID filters. Copy this block into the Aruba Instant CLI, commit it, then submit this step.

After applying the Aruba config, Aruba APs should appear as Bluetooth scanner sources and BLE advertisements should appear in Home Assistant Bluetooth.

```text
{cli_config}
```

To remove the generated Aruba profiles later, use:

```text
{cleanup_cli_config}
```

abort.already_configured: This Aruba BLE Proxy listener is already configured.

cli.title: Aruba CLI configuration

This will create {profile_count} BLE Data transport profiles for {filter_count} service UUID filters. Copy this block into the Aruba Instant CLI and commit it.

generate_cli.name: Generate Aruba CLI configuration

generate_cleanup_cli.name: Generate Aruba cleanup CLI configuration
generate_cleanup_cli.description: Generate an Aruba Instant CLI block that removes the profiles created by this integration.
